title: Update types.ts with union types replacing generic string fields
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/worker/types.ts to add proper union types for fields that are currently typed as string.

Read the existing file first. Add these new type definitions and update the interfaces:

Add:
export type ApprovalState = 'Pending' | 'Approved' | 'Rejected';
export type BuildStatus = 'Queued' | 'InProgress' | 'Succeeded' | 'Failed';
export type BuildClass = 'standard' | 'elevated' | 'critical';
export type RiskLevel = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
export type ReviewDecision = 'Accepted' | 'ReworkRequired' | 'ConditionallyAccepted' | 'Closed';

Then update the interfaces:
- Spec.approvalState: change from string to ApprovalState
- PRD.approvalState: change from string to ApprovalState
- BuildDispatch.status: change from string to BuildStatus
- BuildDispatch.buildClass: change from string to BuildClass
- BuildDispatch.riskLevel: change from string to RiskLevel
- BuildOutput.status: change from string to BuildStatus
- Review.decision: change from string to ReviewDecision

Keep all existing types and interfaces. Only modify the string fields listed above.

Commit the updated file.
